description: Composition:Off white round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitSimple: this is al the difference you can see between black and white money! Flaunt this with jeans, cargos or shorts for that chilled out look this summer.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
